--- # _layouts/mep.html # Used for individual MEP pages (generated by the fetch script # writing _data/meps/.json and the page stub in _pages/meps/). # # Access the MEP's data via: page.mep_id → site.data.meps[id].json --- {% include head.html %} {% include masthead.html %} {% assign mep = site.data.meps[page.mep_id] %}

{{ mep.full_name }}

{{ mep.group_name }} · {{ mep.national_party }} · {{ mep.country }}

    {% if mep.email != "" %}
  • ✉ {{ mep.email }}
    • {% endif %} {% if mep.phone != "" %}
  • 📞 {{ mep.phone }}
    • {% endif %} {% if mep.website != "" %}
  • 🌐 Personal website
    • {% endif %}
  • 🏛 Official EP profile
{% assign has_social = false %} {% if mep.social.linkedin or mep.social.twitter or mep.social.facebook or mep.social.instagram %} {% assign has_social = true %} {% endif %} {% if has_social %}
    {% if mep.social.linkedin %}
  • LinkedIn
    • {% endif %} {% if mep.social.twitter %}
  • X / Twitter
    • {% endif %} {% if mep.social.facebook %}
  • Facebook
    • {% endif %} {% if mep.social.instagram %}
  • Instagram
    • {% endif %}
{% endif %}
{% if mep.committees.size > 0 %}

Committee memberships

    {% for c in mep.committees %} {% assign c_abbr = c.abbr | default: c.id %} {% assign c_name = c.name %}
  • {{ c_abbr }}{% if c_name != "" and c_name != c_abbr %} — {{ c_name }}{% endif %} {% if c.role != "" %} {% assign role_label = c.role | replace: "_", " " | downcase %} {% if role_label contains "chair" and role_label contains "vice" %} {{ role_label | capitalize }} {% elsif role_label contains "chair" %} {{ role_label | capitalize }} {% else %} {{ role_label | capitalize }} {% endif %} {% endif %}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %}

Recent plenary votes

{% assign mep_vote_records = site.data.mep_votes[page.mep_id] %} {% if mep_vote_records.size > 0 %} {% assign for_count = mep_vote_records | where: "position", "for" | size %} {% assign against_count = mep_vote_records | where: "position", "against" | size %} {% assign abstain_count = mep_vote_records | where: "position", "abstain" | size %}
{{ mep_vote_records.size }} votes tracked FOR {{ for_count }} AGAINST {{ against_count }} ABSTAIN {{ abstain_count }}
    {% for vr in mep_vote_records %}
  • {{ vr.date }} {{ vr.position }} {% if vr.ep_url != "" %} {{ vr.title | default: vr.vote_id | truncate: 110 }} {% else %} {{ vr.title | default: vr.vote_id | truncate: 110 }} {% endif %} {% if vr.result != "" %} {{ vr.result }} {% endif %}
    • {% endfor %}

Browse all plenary votes →

{% else %} {% assign recent_votes = site.data.votes | where_exp: "v", "v.title != ''" %} {% if recent_votes.size > 0 %}

Individual vote positions not yet available — showing recent plenary votes.

    {% for vote in recent_votes limit: 8 %}
  • {{ vote.date }} {% if vote.ep_url != "" %} {{ vote.title }} {% else %} {{ vote.title }} {% endif %} {% if vote.result != "" %} {{ vote.result }} {% endif %}
    • {% endfor %}
{% else %}

No recent vote data available.

{% endif %}

Browse all plenary votes →

{% endif %}

Parliamentary questions & interventions

{% assign mep_questions = site.data.questions | where_exp: "q", "q.authors contains mep.id" %} {% if mep_questions.size > 0 %}
    {% for q in mep_questions limit: 10 %}
  • {{ q.date }} {% if q.ep_url != "" %} {{ q.title | default: q.ref | default: q.id }} {% else %} {{ q.title | default: q.ref | default: q.id }} {% endif %} {{ q.type }} {% if q.authors.size > 1 %} Co-authored with: {% for author_id in q.authors %} {% unless author_id == mep.id %} {% assign co_author = site.data.meps[author_id] %} {% if co_author %} {{ co_author.full_name }}{% unless forloop.last %}, {% endunless %} {% endif %} {% endunless %} {% endfor %} {% endif %}
    • {% endfor %}
{% if mep_questions.size > 10 %}

Showing 10 of {{ mep_questions.size }} questions.

{% endif %} {% else %}

No recent parliamentary questions from this MEP in the current dataset.

{% endif %}
{% include footer.html %}
